model: Rasanen statistical backreaction / peak model (Buchert averaging; arXiv:0801.2692, 0805.2670, 0812.2872)
params: (Om0, OQ0) joint late-mode; k=2 cosmological params
dBIC_note: dBIC = dchi2 + (k-1)*ln(N), k=2 (Om0,OQ0) vs LCDM k=1, N=1593, ln(N)=7.37 -- same Occam convention as joint_w0wa.py / model_ltbvoid.py
verdict_of_verification: Reproduced from src/model_rasanen.py: joint late-mode dBIC~+72 (above timescape's +67 once its 2nd backreaction parameter is charged the ln N Occam penalty); SN demand backreaction beyond the physical peak-model ceiling and within the ceiling produce no acceleration. Row of tab:voids now backed by this artifact.
